summary: Iteration 95 - Sprint Features Testing completed. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend builds successfully. Verified: 1) GPS Bug Fix - SpotSelector uses correct /api/surf-spots/nearby endpoint with radius_miles parameter, 2) GET /api/photographer/{id}/status returns is_shooting and current_spot_name, 3) POST /api/photographer/{id}/go-live accepts spot_name parameter, 4) Crew Payment endpoints (crew-status, nudge-all, update-splits) exist and respond correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GPS Bug Fix VERIFIED: SpotSelector.js uses /api/surf-spots/nearby (line 86) with radius_miles parameter (line 90)
GET /api/photographer/{id}/status correctly returns is_shooting, current_spot_name, on_demand_available, current_spot_id
POST /api/photographer/{id}/go-live accepts spot_name parameter in GoLiveRequest model
GET /api/bookings/{id}/crew-status returns crew payment status with participant details
POST /api/bookings/{id}/nudge-all sends reminders to all pending crew members
POST /api/bookings/{id}/update-splits validates total equals booking price before updating
CrewPaymentDashboard.js correctly integrates with all three crew payment endpoints
SurferSessionHub.js includes SpotSelector for Go Live spot selection (lines 275-301)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint features verified: 1) GPS Bug Fix - SpotSelector uses /api/surf-spots/nearby with radius_miles (not /api/spots/nearby with radius), 2) Photographer status endpoint returns is_shooting and current_spot_name, 3) Go-live accepts spot_name parameter, 4) Crew payment endpoints (crew-status, nudge-all, update-splits) all working. All backend APIs tested and passing.

features_verified.gps_bug_fix_spot_selector: VERIFIED - SpotSelector.js uses /api/surf-spots/nearby with radius_miles parameter

features_verified.go_live_spot_name_param: VERIFIED - POST /api/photographer/{id}/go-live accepts spot_name in request body
features_verified.crew_status_endpoint: VERIFIED - GET /api/bookings/{id}/crew-status returns crew payment status
features_verified.nudge_all_endpoint: VERIFIED - POST /api/bookings/{id}/nudge-all sends reminders to pending crew
features_verified.update_splits_endpoint: VERIFIED - POST /api/bookings/{id}/update-splits updates custom payment splits
features_verified.surfer_session_hub_compiles: VERIFIED - SurferSessionHub.js compiles with Go Live spot selector
features_verified.spot_selector_compiles: VERIFIED - SpotSelector.js compiles with correct API endpoint
features_verified.crew_payment_dashboard_compiles: VERIFIED - CrewPaymentDashboard.js compiles and renders for host surfers
